version_description: More complex chords (7th, 9th, etc.) are included, and the pitch drop at the end is approximated by modulating a half-step down.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Gadd9[/ch] [ch]A6[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]       [ch]Gadd9[/ch]      [ch]A7[/ch]
It's fine, it's cool[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
You can say that we are nothing[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
But you know the truth[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Gadd9[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]
And guess I'm the fool[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
With her arms out like an angel[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Through the car sunroof[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]
   I don't wanna call it off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
   But you don't wanna call it love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]
   You only wanna be the one[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]
That I call "baby"[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]                [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
You can kiss a hundred boys in bars[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Shoot another shot, try to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]                   [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
You can say it's just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Make a new excuse, another stupid reason[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]
Good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj9[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
You have to stop the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]
Good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj9[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
You have to stop the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Just to stop the feeling[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Gadd9[/ch]      [ch]A7[/ch]
I'm cliche, who cares?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
It's a sexually explicit[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Kind of love affair[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Gadd9[/ch]       [ch]A7[/ch]
And I cry, it's not fair[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
I just need a little loving[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I just need a little air[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]
   Think I'm gonna call it off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
   Even if you call it love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]
   I just wanna love someone[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]
Who calls me baby[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]                [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
You can kiss a hundred boys in bars[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Shoot another shot, try to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]                   [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
You can say it's just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Make a new excuse, another stupid reason[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]
Good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj9[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
You have to stop the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]
Good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj9[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
You have to stop the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Just to stop the feeling[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Em9[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
(Oh, oh, yeah, oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]Em9[/ch]
When you wake up next to him[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]
In the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Em9[/ch]
With your head in your hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
You're nothing more than his wife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]Em9[/ch]
And when you think about me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
All of those years ago[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]Em9[/ch]
You're standing face-to-face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]     [ch]Em7[/ch]
With "I told you"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]Em9[/ch]
You know I'd hate to say[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
I told you so[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]Em9[/ch]
You know I'd hate to say, but[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
I told you so[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]                [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
You can kiss a hundred boys in bars[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Shoot another shot, try to stop the feeling (well, I told you so)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]                   [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
You can say it's just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Make a new excuse, another stupid reason[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]
Good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj9[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
You have to stop the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Gmaj9[/ch]
Good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj9[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe! (Well, good luck!)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
You have to stop the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Just to stop the feeling[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
You have to stop the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
You have to stop the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
You have to stop the world[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
Just to stop the feeling[/tab]
